    FROM [Projects] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[Code], [w].[ConstituencyId], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Name], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Wards] AS [w]
        WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [p].[WardId] = [t].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Code], [c].[CountyId], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Constituencies] AS [c]
        WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t0] ON [t].[ConstituencyId] = [t0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[Code], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[CreatedBy], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[Name], [c0].[UpdatedAt], [c0].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Counties] AS [c0]
        WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [t0].[CountyId] = [t1].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [c1].[Id], [c1].[Code], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedBy], [c1].[DepartmentId], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[Name], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [c1].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Clusters] AS [c1]
        WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t2] ON [p].[ClusterId] = [t2].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [p].[ProjectLeadId] = [u].[Id]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND ([p].[LastUpdatedById] = @__userId_0 OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p0]
        WHERE [p0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [p].[Id] = [p0].[ProjectId] AND [p0].[UserId] = @__userId_0 AND [p0].[RevokedAt] IS NULL))
) AS [t3]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[Id], [p1].[AssignedAt], [p1].[CreatedAt], [p1].[CreatedBy], [p1].[IsDeleted], [p1].[ProjectId], [p1].[RevokedAt], [p1].[Role], [p1].[UpdatedAt], [p1].[UpdatedBy], [p1].[UserId], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[AccessFailedCount], [u0].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[EmailConfirmed], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LastLoginAt], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[LockoutEnabled], [u0].[LockoutEnd], [u0].[NormalizedEmail], [u0].[NormalizedUserName], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u0].[SecurityStamp], [u0].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u0].[UserName], [u0].[BaseLatitude], [u0].[BaseLongitude], [u0].[BaseRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p1]
    INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
    WHERE [p1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t4] ON [t3].[Id] = [t4].[ProjectId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [w0].[Id], [w0].[CreatedAt], [w0].[CreatedBy], [w0].[Description], [w0].[FilePath], [w0].[IsDeleted], [w0].[IsGeoValidated], [w0].[Progress], [w0].[ProjectId], [w0].[Title], [w0].[UpdatedAt], [w0].[UpdatedBy], [w0].[SubmissionLatitude], [w0].[SubmissionLongitude], [w0].[SubmissionRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [WeeklyReports] AS [w0]
    WHERE [w0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t5] ON [t3].[Id] = [t5].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [t3].[Id], [t3].[Id0], [t3].[Id1], [t3].[Id2], [t3].[Id3], [t3].[Id4], [t4].[Id], [t4].[Id0]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[ClusterId], [p].[ConsultantName], [p].[ContractSum], [p].[ContractorName], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CurrentPhysicalProgress], [p].[Description], [p].[EndDate], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[LastProgressUpdate], [p].[LastUpdatedById], [p].[Latitude], [p].[Longitude], [p].[Name], [p].[ProjectLeadId], [p].[RadiusInMeters], [p].[StartDate], [p].[Status], [p].[TenderNumber], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UpdatedBy], [p].[WardId], [t].[Id] AS [Id0], [t].[Code], [t].[ConstituencyId], [t].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [t].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy0], [t].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t].[Name] AS [Name0], [t].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0], [t].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy0], [t0].[Id] AS [Id1], [t0].[Code] AS [Code0], [t0].[CountyId], [t0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [t0].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy1], [t0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted1], [t0].[Name] AS [Name1], [t0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt1], [t0].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy1], [t1].[Id] AS [Id2], [t1].[Code] AS [Code1], [t1].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt2], [t1].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy2], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted2], [t1].[Name] AS [Name2], [t1].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt2], [t1].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy2], [t2].[Id] AS [Id3], [t2].[Code] AS [Code2], [t2].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt3], [t2].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy3], [t2].[DepartmentId], [t2].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted3], [t2].[Name] AS [Name3], [t2].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt3], [t2].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy3], [u].[Id] AS [Id4], [u].[AccessFailedCount], [u].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt4], [u].[Email], [u].[EmailConfirmed], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[LastLoginAt], [u].[LastName], [u].[LockoutEnabled], [u].[LockoutEnd], [u].[NormalizedEmail], [u].[NormalizedUserName], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u].[SecurityStamp], [u].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u].[UserName], [u].[BaseLatitude], [u].[BaseLongitude], [u].[BaseRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [Projects] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[Code], [w].[ConstituencyId], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Name], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Wards] AS [w]
        WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [p].[WardId] = [t].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Code], [c].[CountyId], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Constituencies] AS [c]
        WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t0] ON [t].[ConstituencyId] = [t0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[Code], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[CreatedBy], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[Name], [c0].[UpdatedAt], [c0].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Counties] AS [c0]
        WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [t0].[CountyId] = [t1].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [c1].[Id], [c1].[Code], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedBy], [c1].[DepartmentId], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[Name], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [c1].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Clusters] AS [c1]
        WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t2] ON [p].[ClusterId] = [t2].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [p].[ProjectLeadId] = [u].[Id]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND ([p].[LastUpdatedById] = @__userId_0 OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p0]
        WHERE [p0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [p].[Id] = [p0].[ProjectId] AND [p0].[UserId] = @__userId_0 AND [p0].[RevokedAt] IS NULL))
) AS [t3]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[Id], [p1].[AssignedAt], [p1].[CreatedAt], [p1].[CreatedBy], [p1].[IsDeleted], [p1].[ProjectId], [p1].[RevokedAt], [p1].[Role], [p1].[UpdatedAt], [p1].[UpdatedBy], [p1].[UserId], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[AccessFailedCount], [u0].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[EmailConfirmed], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LastLoginAt], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[LockoutEnabled], [u0].[LockoutEnd], [u0].[NormalizedEmail], [u0].[NormalizedUserName], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u0].[SecurityStamp], [u0].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u0].[UserName], [u0].[BaseLatitude], [u0].[BaseLongitude], [u0].[BaseRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p1]
    INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
    WHERE [p1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t4] ON [t3].[Id] = [t4].[ProjectId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [w0].[Id], [w0].[CreatedAt], [w0].[CreatedBy], [w0].[Description], [w0].[FilePath], [w0].[IsDeleted], [w0].[IsGeoValidated], [w0].[Progress], [w0].[ProjectId], [w0].[Title], [w0].[UpdatedAt], [w0].[UpdatedBy], [w0].[SubmissionLatitude], [w0].[SubmissionLongitude], [w0].[SubmissionRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [WeeklyReports] AS [w0]
    WHERE [w0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t5] ON [t3].[Id] = [t5].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [t3].[Id], [t3].[Id0], [t3].[Id1], [t3].[Id2], [t3].[Id3], [t3].[Id4], [t4].[Id], [t4].[Id0]

FROM (
    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[ClusterId], [p].[ConsultantName], [p].[ContractSum], [p].[ContractorName], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CurrentPhysicalProgress], [p].[Description], [p].[EndDate], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[LastProgressUpdate], [p].[LastUpdatedById], [p].[Latitude], [p].[Longitude], [p].[Name], [p].[ProjectLeadId], [p].[RadiusInMeters], [p].[StartDate], [p].[Status], [p].[TenderNumber], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UpdatedBy], [p].[WardId], [t].[Id] AS [Id0], [t].[Code], [t].[ConstituencyId], [t].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [t].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy0], [t].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t].[Name] AS [Name0], [t].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0], [t].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy0], [t0].[Id] AS [Id1], [t0].[Code] AS [Code0], [t0].[CountyId], [t0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [t0].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy1], [t0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted1], [t0].[Name] AS [Name1], [t0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt1], [t0].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy1], [t1].[Id] AS [Id2], [t1].[Code] AS [Code1], [t1].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt2], [t1].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy2], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted2], [t1].[Name] AS [Name2], [t1].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt2], [t1].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy2], [t2].[Id] AS [Id3], [t2].[Code] AS [Code2], [t2].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt3], [t2].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy3], [t2].[DepartmentId], [t2].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted3], [t2].[Name] AS [Name3], [t2].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt3], [t2].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy3], [u].[Id] AS [Id4], [u].[AccessFailedCount], [u].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt4], [u].[Email], [u].[EmailConfirmed], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[LastLoginAt], [u].[LastName], [u].[LockoutEnabled], [u].[LockoutEnd], [u].[NormalizedEmail], [u].[NormalizedUserName], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u].[SecurityStamp], [u].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u].[UserName], [u].[BaseLatitude], [u].[BaseLongitude], [u].[BaseRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [Projects] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[Code], [w].[ConstituencyId], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Name], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Wards] AS [w]
        WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [p].[WardId] = [t].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Code], [c].[CountyId], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Constituencies] AS [c]
        WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t0] ON [t].[ConstituencyId] = [t0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[Code], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[CreatedBy], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[Name], [c0].[UpdatedAt], [c0].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Counties] AS [c0]
        WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [t0].[CountyId] = [t1].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [c1].[Id], [c1].[Code], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedBy], [c1].[DepartmentId], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[Name], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [c1].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Clusters] AS [c1]
        WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t2] ON [p].[ClusterId] = [t2].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [p].[ProjectLeadId] = [u].[Id]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND ([p].[LastUpdatedById] = @__userId_0 OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p0]
        WHERE [p0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [p].[Id] = [p0].[ProjectId] AND [p0].[UserId] = @__userId_0 AND [p0].[RevokedAt] IS NULL))
) AS [t3]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[Id], [p1].[AssignedAt], [p1].[CreatedAt], [p1].[CreatedBy], [p1].[IsDeleted], [p1].[ProjectId], [p1].[RevokedAt], [p1].[Role], [p1].[UpdatedAt], [p1].[UpdatedBy], [p1].[UserId], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[AccessFailedCount], [u0].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[EmailConfirmed], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LastLoginAt], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[LockoutEnabled], [u0].[LockoutEnd], [u0].[NormalizedEmail], [u0].[NormalizedUserName], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u0].[SecurityStamp], [u0].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u0].[UserName], [u0].[BaseLatitude], [u0].[BaseLongitude], [u0].[BaseRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p1]
    INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
    WHERE [p1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t4] ON [t3].[Id] = [t4].[ProjectId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [w0].[Id], [w0].[CreatedAt], [w0].[CreatedBy], [w0].[Description], [w0].[FilePath], [w0].[IsDeleted], [w0].[IsGeoValidated], [w0].[Progress], [w0].[ProjectId], [w0].[Title], [w0].[UpdatedAt], [w0].[UpdatedBy], [w0].[SubmissionLatitude], [w0].[SubmissionLongitude], [w0].[SubmissionRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [WeeklyReports] AS [w0]
    WHERE [w0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t5] ON [t3].[Id] = [t5].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [t3].[Id], [t3].[Id0], [t3].[Id1], [t3].[Id2], [t3].[Id3], [t3].[Id4], [t4].[Id], [t4].[Id0]

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[ClusterId], [p].[ConsultantName], [p].[ContractSum], [p].[ContractorName], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CurrentPhysicalProgress], [p].[Description], [p].[EndDate], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[LastProgressUpdate], [p].[LastUpdatedById], [p].[Latitude], [p].[Longitude], [p].[Name], [p].[ProjectLeadId], [p].[RadiusInMeters], [p].[StartDate], [p].[Status], [p].[TenderNumber], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UpdatedBy], [p].[WardId], [t].[Id] AS [Id0], [t].[Code], [t].[ConstituencyId], [t].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [t].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy0], [t].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t].[Name] AS [Name0], [t].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0], [t].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy0], [t0].[Id] AS [Id1], [t0].[Code] AS [Code0], [t0].[CountyId], [t0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [t0].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy1], [t0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted1], [t0].[Name] AS [Name1], [t0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt1], [t0].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy1], [t1].[Id] AS [Id2], [t1].[Code] AS [Code1], [t1].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt2], [t1].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy2], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted2], [t1].[Name] AS [Name2], [t1].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt2], [t1].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy2], [t2].[Id] AS [Id3], [t2].[Code] AS [Code2], [t2].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt3], [t2].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy3], [t2].[DepartmentId], [t2].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted3], [t2].[Name] AS [Name3], [t2].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt3], [t2].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy3], [u].[Id] AS [Id4], [u].[AccessFailedCount], [u].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt4], [u].[Email], [u].[EmailConfirmed], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[LastLoginAt], [u].[LastName], [u].[LockoutEnabled], [u].[LockoutEnd], [u].[NormalizedEmail], [u].[NormalizedUserName], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u].[SecurityStamp], [u].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u].[UserName], [u].[BaseLatitude], [u].[BaseLongitude], [u].[BaseRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [Projects] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[Code], [w].[ConstituencyId], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Name], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Wards] AS [w]
        WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [p].[WardId] = [t].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Code], [c].[CountyId], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Constituencies] AS [c]
        WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t0] ON [t].[ConstituencyId] = [t0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[Code], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[CreatedBy], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[Name], [c0].[UpdatedAt], [c0].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Counties] AS [c0]
        WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [t0].[CountyId] = [t1].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [c1].[Id], [c1].[Code], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedBy], [c1].[DepartmentId], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[Name], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [c1].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Clusters] AS [c1]
        WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t2] ON [p].[ClusterId] = [t2].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [p].[ProjectLeadId] = [u].[Id]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND ([p].[LastUpdatedById] = @__userId_0 OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p0]
        WHERE [p0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [p].[Id] = [p0].[ProjectId] AND [p0].[UserId] = @__userId_0 AND [p0].[RevokedAt] IS NULL))
) AS [t3]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[Id], [p1].[AssignedAt], [p1].[CreatedAt], [p1].[CreatedBy], [p1].[IsDeleted], [p1].[ProjectId], [p1].[RevokedAt], [p1].[Role], [p1].[UpdatedAt], [p1].[UpdatedBy], [p1].[UserId], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[AccessFailedCount], [u0].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[EmailConfirmed], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LastLoginAt], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[LockoutEnabled], [u0].[LockoutEnd], [u0].[NormalizedEmail], [u0].[NormalizedUserName], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u0].[SecurityStamp], [u0].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u0].[UserName], [u0].[BaseLatitude], [u0].[BaseLongitude], [u0].[BaseRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p1]
    INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
    WHERE [p1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t4] ON [t3].[Id] = [t4].[ProjectId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [w0].[Id], [w0].[CreatedAt], [w0].[CreatedBy], [w0].[Description], [w0].[FilePath], [w0].[IsDeleted], [w0].[IsGeoValidated], [w0].[Progress], [w0].[ProjectId], [w0].[Title], [w0].[UpdatedAt], [w0].[UpdatedBy], [w0].[SubmissionLatitude], [w0].[SubmissionLongitude], [w0].[SubmissionRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [WeeklyReports] AS [w0]
    WHERE [w0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t5] ON [t3].[Id] = [t5].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [t3].[Id], [t3].[Id0], [t3].[Id1], [t3].[Id2], [t3].[Id3], [t3].[Id4], [t4].[Id], [t4].[Id0]

        FROM [Wards] AS [w]
        WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [p].[WardId] = [t].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Code], [c].[CountyId], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy]

        WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)

    INNER JOIN (

) AS [t3]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[Id], [p1].[AssignedAt], [p1].[CreatedAt], [p1].[CreatedBy], [p1].[IsDeleted], [p1].[ProjectId], [p1].[RevokedAt], [p1].[Role], [p1].[UpdatedAt], [p1].[UpdatedBy], [p1].[UserId], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[AccessFailedCount], [u0].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[EmailConfirmed], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LastLoginAt], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[LockoutEnabled], [u0].[LockoutEnd], [u0].[NormalizedEmail], [u0].[NormalizedUserName], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u0].[SecurityStamp], [u0].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u0].[UserName], [u0].[BaseLatitude], [u0].[BaseLongitude], [u0].[BaseRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p1]
    INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
    WHERE [p1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t4] ON [t3].[Id] = [t4].[ProjectId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [w0].[Id], [w0].[CreatedAt], [w0].[CreatedBy], [w0].[Description], [w0].[FilePath], [w0].[IsDeleted], [w0].[IsGeoValidated], [w0].[Progress], [w0].[ProjectId], [w0].[Title], [w0].[UpdatedAt], [w0].[UpdatedBy], [w0].[SubmissionLatitude], [w0].[SubmissionLongitude], [w0].[SubmissionRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [WeeklyReports] AS [w0]
    WHERE [w0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t5] ON [t3].[Id] = [t5].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [t3].[Id], [t3].[Id0], [t3].[Id1], [t3].[Id2], [t3].[Id3], [t3].[Id4], [t4].[Id], [t4].[Id0]

    FROM [Projects] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[Code], [w].[ConstituencyId], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Name], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Wards] AS [w]
        WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [p].[WardId] = [t].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Code], [c].[CountyId], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Constituencies] AS [c]
        WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t0] ON [t].[ConstituencyId] = [t0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[Code], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[CreatedBy], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[Name], [c0].[UpdatedAt], [c0].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Counties] AS [c0]
        WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [t0].[CountyId] = [t1].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [c1].[Id], [c1].[Code], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedBy], [c1].[DepartmentId], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[Name], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [c1].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Clusters] AS [c1]
        WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t2] ON [p].[ClusterId] = [t2].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [p].[ProjectLeadId] = [u].[Id]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND ([p].[LastUpdatedById] = @__userId_0 OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p0]
        WHERE [p0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [p].[Id] = [p0].[ProjectId] AND [p0].[UserId] = @__userId_0 AND [p0].[RevokedAt] IS NULL))
) AS [t3]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[Id], [p1].[AssignedAt], [p1].[CreatedAt], [p1].[CreatedBy], [p1].[IsDeleted], [p1].[ProjectId], [p1].[RevokedAt], [p1].[Role], [p1].[UpdatedAt], [p1].[UpdatedBy], [p1].[UserId], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[AccessFailedCount], [u0].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[EmailConfirmed], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LastLoginAt], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[LockoutEnabled], [u0].[LockoutEnd], [u0].[NormalizedEmail], [u0].[NormalizedUserName], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u0].[SecurityStamp], [u0].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u0].[UserName], [u0].[BaseLatitude], [u0].[BaseLongitude], [u0].[BaseRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p1]
    INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
    WHERE [p1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t4] ON [t3].[Id] = [t4].[ProjectId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [w0].[Id], [w0].[CreatedAt], [w0].[CreatedBy], [w0].[Description], [w0].[FilePath], [w0].[IsDeleted], [w0].[IsGeoValidated], [w0].[Progress], [w0].[ProjectId], [w0].[Title], [w0].[UpdatedAt], [w0].[UpdatedBy], [w0].[SubmissionLatitude], [w0].[SubmissionLongitude], [w0].[SubmissionRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [WeeklyReports] AS [w0]
    WHERE [w0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t5] ON [t3].[Id] = [t5].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [t3].[Id], [t3].[Id0], [t3].[Id1], [t3].[Id2], [t3].[Id3], [t3].[Id4], [t4].[Id], [t4].[Id0]

FROM (

    FROM [Projects] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[Code], [w].[ConstituencyId], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Name], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Wards] AS [w]
        WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [p].[WardId] = [t].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Code], [c].[CountyId], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Constituencies] AS [c]
        WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t0] ON [t].[ConstituencyId] = [t0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[Code], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[CreatedBy], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[Name], [c0].[UpdatedAt], [c0].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Counties] AS [c0]
        WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [t0].[CountyId] = [t1].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [c1].[Id], [c1].[Code], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedBy], [c1].[DepartmentId], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[Name], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [c1].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Clusters] AS [c1]
        WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t2] ON [p].[ClusterId] = [t2].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [p].[ProjectLeadId] = [u].[Id]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND ([p].[LastUpdatedById] = @__userId_0 OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p0]
        WHERE [p0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [p].[Id] = [p0].[ProjectId] AND [p0].[UserId] = @__userId_0 AND [p0].[RevokedAt] IS NULL))
) AS [t3]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[Id], [p1].[AssignedAt], [p1].[CreatedAt], [p1].[CreatedBy], [p1].[IsDeleted], [p1].[ProjectId], [p1].[RevokedAt], [p1].[Role], [p1].[UpdatedAt], [p1].[UpdatedBy], [p1].[UserId], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[AccessFailedCount], [u0].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[EmailConfirmed], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LastLoginAt], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[LockoutEnabled], [u0].[LockoutEnd], [u0].[NormalizedEmail], [u0].[NormalizedUserName], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u0].[SecurityStamp], [u0].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u0].[UserName], [u0].[BaseLatitude], [u0].[BaseLongitude], [u0].[BaseRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p1]
    INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
    WHERE [p1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t4] ON [t3].[Id] = [t4].[ProjectId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [w0].[Id], [w0].[CreatedAt], [w0].[CreatedBy], [w0].[Description], [w0].[FilePath], [w0].[IsDeleted], [w0].[IsGeoValidated], [w0].[Progress], [w0].[ProjectId], [w0].[Title], [w0].[UpdatedAt], [w0].[UpdatedBy], [w0].[SubmissionLatitude], [w0].[SubmissionLongitude], [w0].[SubmissionRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [WeeklyReports] AS [w0]
    WHERE [w0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t5] ON [t3].[Id] = [t5].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [t3].[Id], [t3].[Id0], [t3].[Id1], [t3].[Id2], [t3].[Id3], [t3].[Id4], [t4].[Id], [t4].[Id0]

    INNER JOIN (

    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Code], [c].[CountyId], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Constituencies] AS [c]

    ) AS [t0] ON [t].[ConstituencyId] = [t0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[Code], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[CreatedBy], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[Name], [c0].[UpdatedAt], [c0].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Counties] AS [c0]
        WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [t0].[CountyId] = [t1].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [c1].[Id], [c1].[Code], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedBy], [c1].[DepartmentId], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[Name], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [c1].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Clusters] AS [c1]
        WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t2] ON [p].[ClusterId] = [t2].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [p].[ProjectLeadId] = [u].[Id]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND ([p].[LastUpdatedById] = @__userId_0 OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p0]
        WHERE [p0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [p].[Id] = [p0].[ProjectId] AND [p0].[UserId] = @__userId_0 AND [p0].[RevokedAt] IS NULL))
) AS [t3]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[Id], [p1].[AssignedAt], [p1].[CreatedAt], [p1].[CreatedBy], [p1].[IsDeleted], [p1].[ProjectId], [p1].[RevokedAt], [p1].[Role], [p1].[UpdatedAt], [p1].[UpdatedBy], [p1].[UserId], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[AccessFailedCount], [u0].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[EmailConfirmed], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LastLoginAt], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[LockoutEnabled], [u0].[LockoutEnd], [u0].[NormalizedEmail], [u0].[NormalizedUserName], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u0].[SecurityStamp], [u0].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u0].[UserName], [u0].[BaseLatitude], [u0].[BaseLongitude], [u0].[BaseRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p1]
    INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
    WHERE [p1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t4] ON [t3].[Id] = [t4].[ProjectId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [w0].[Id], [w0].[CreatedAt], [w0].[CreatedBy], [w0].[Description], [w0].[FilePath], [w0].[IsDeleted], [w0].[IsGeoValidated], [w0].[Progress], [w0].[ProjectId], [w0].[Title], [w0].[UpdatedAt], [w0].[UpdatedBy], [w0].[SubmissionLatitude], [w0].[SubmissionLongitude], [w0].[SubmissionRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [WeeklyReports] AS [w0]
    WHERE [w0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t5] ON [t3].[Id] = [t5].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [t3].[Id], [t3].[Id0], [t3].[Id1], [t3].[Id2], [t3].[Id3], [t3].[Id4], [t4].[Id], [t4].[Id0]

    ) AS [t1] ON [t0].[CountyId] = [t1].[Id]

    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[Code], [w].[ConstituencyId], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Name], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Wards] AS [w]
        WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [p].[WardId] = [t].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Code], [c].[CountyId], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Constituencies] AS [c]
        WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t0] ON [t].[ConstituencyId] = [t0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[Code], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[CreatedBy], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[Name], [c0].[UpdatedAt], [c0].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Counties] AS [c0]
        WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [t0].[CountyId] = [t1].[Id]

        FROM [Clusters] AS [c1]
        WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t2] ON [p].[ClusterId] = [t2].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [p].[ProjectLeadId] = [u].[Id]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND ([p].[LastUpdatedById] = @__userId_0 OR EXISTS (

        FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p0]

    WHERE [p1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t4] ON [t3].[Id] = [t4].[ProjectId]

        SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[Code], [w].[ConstituencyId], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Name], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Wards] AS [w]
        WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [p].[WardId] = [t].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Code], [c].[CountyId], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy]

    SELECT TOP(1) [p].[Id], [p].[ClusterId], [p].[ConsultantName], [p].[ContractSum], [p].[ContractorName], [p].[CreatedAt], [p].[CreatedBy], [p].[CurrentPhysicalProgress], [p].[Description], [p].[EndDate], [p].[IsDeleted], [p].[LastProgressUpdate], [p].[LastUpdatedById], [p].[Latitude], [p].[Longitude], [p].[Name], [p].[ProjectLeadId], [p].[RadiusInMeters], [p].[StartDate], [p].[Status], [p].[TenderNumber], [p].[UpdatedAt], [p].[UpdatedBy], [p].[WardId], [t].[Id] AS [Id0], [t].[Code], [t].[ConstituencyId], [t].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [t].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy0], [t].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted0], [t].[Name] AS [Name0], [t].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt0], [t].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy0], [t0].[Id] AS [Id1], [t0].[Code] AS [Code0], [t0].[CountyId], [t0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt1], [t0].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy1], [t0].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted1], [t0].[Name] AS [Name1], [t0].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt1], [t0].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy1], [t1].[Id] AS [Id2], [t1].[Code] AS [Code1], [t1].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt2], [t1].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy2], [t1].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted2], [t1].[Name] AS [Name2], [t1].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt2], [t1].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy2], [t2].[Id] AS [Id3], [t2].[Code] AS [Code2], [t2].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt3], [t2].[CreatedBy] AS [CreatedBy3], [t2].[DepartmentId], [t2].[IsDeleted] AS [IsDeleted3], [t2].[Name] AS [Name3], [t2].[UpdatedAt] AS [UpdatedAt3], [t2].[UpdatedBy] AS [UpdatedBy3], [u].[Id] AS [Id4], [u].[AccessFailedCount], [u].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt4], [u].[Email], [u].[EmailConfirmed], [u].[FirstName], [u].[IsActive], [u].[LastLoginAt], [u].[LastName], [u].[LockoutEnabled], [u].[LockoutEnd], [u].[NormalizedEmail], [u].[NormalizedUserName], [u].[PasswordHash], [u].[PhoneNumber], [u].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u].[SecurityStamp], [u].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u].[UserName], [u].[BaseLatitude], [u].[BaseLongitude], [u].[BaseRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [Projects] AS [p]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [w].[Id], [w].[Code], [w].[ConstituencyId], [w].[CreatedAt], [w].[CreatedBy], [w].[IsDeleted], [w].[Name], [w].[UpdatedAt], [w].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Wards] AS [w]
        WHERE [w].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t] ON [p].[WardId] = [t].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c].[Id], [c].[Code], [c].[CountyId], [c].[CreatedAt], [c].[CreatedBy], [c].[IsDeleted], [c].[Name], [c].[UpdatedAt], [c].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Constituencies] AS [c]
        WHERE [c].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t0] ON [t].[ConstituencyId] = [t0].[Id]
    INNER JOIN (
        SELECT [c0].[Id], [c0].[Code], [c0].[CreatedAt], [c0].[CreatedBy], [c0].[IsDeleted], [c0].[Name], [c0].[UpdatedAt], [c0].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Counties] AS [c0]
        WHERE [c0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t1] ON [t0].[CountyId] = [t1].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN (
        SELECT [c1].[Id], [c1].[Code], [c1].[CreatedAt], [c1].[CreatedBy], [c1].[DepartmentId], [c1].[IsDeleted], [c1].[Name], [c1].[UpdatedAt], [c1].[UpdatedBy]
        FROM [Clusters] AS [c1]
        WHERE [c1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
    ) AS [t2] ON [p].[ClusterId] = [t2].[Id]
    LEFT JOIN [Users] AS [u] ON [p].[ProjectLeadId] = [u].[Id]
    WHERE [p].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND ([p].[LastUpdatedById] = @__userId_0 OR EXISTS (
        SELECT 1
        FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p0]
        WHERE [p0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit) AND [p].[Id] = [p0].[ProjectId] AND [p0].[UserId] = @__userId_0 AND [p0].[RevokedAt] IS NULL))
) AS [t3]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [p1].[Id], [p1].[AssignedAt], [p1].[CreatedAt], [p1].[CreatedBy], [p1].[IsDeleted], [p1].[ProjectId], [p1].[RevokedAt], [p1].[Role], [p1].[UpdatedAt], [p1].[UpdatedBy], [p1].[UserId], [u0].[Id] AS [Id0], [u0].[AccessFailedCount], [u0].[ConcurrencyStamp], [u0].[CreatedAt] AS [CreatedAt0], [u0].[Email], [u0].[EmailConfirmed], [u0].[FirstName], [u0].[IsActive], [u0].[LastLoginAt], [u0].[LastName], [u0].[LockoutEnabled], [u0].[LockoutEnd], [u0].[NormalizedEmail], [u0].[NormalizedUserName], [u0].[PasswordHash], [u0].[PhoneNumber], [u0].[PhoneNumberConfirmed], [u0].[SecurityStamp], [u0].[TwoFactorEnabled], [u0].[UserName], [u0].[BaseLatitude], [u0].[BaseLongitude], [u0].[BaseRadiusInMeters]
    FROM [ProjectAssignments] AS [p1]
    INNER JOIN [Users] AS [u0] ON [p1].[UserId] = [u0].[Id]
    WHERE [p1].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t4] ON [t3].[Id] = [t4].[ProjectId]
LEFT JOIN (
    SELECT [w0].[Id], [w0].[CreatedAt], [w0].[CreatedBy], [w0].[Description], [w0].[FilePath], [w0].[IsDeleted], [w0].[IsGeoValidated], [w0].[Progress], [w0].[ProjectId], [w0].[Title], [w0].[UpdatedAt], [w0].[UpdatedBy], [w0].[SubmissionLatitude], [w0].[SubmissionLongitude], [w0].[SubmissionRadiusInMeters]

    WHERE [w0].[IsDeleted] = CAST(0 AS bit)
) AS [t5] ON [t3].[Id] = [t5].[ProjectId]
ORDER BY [t3].[Id], [t3].[Id0], [t3].[Id1], [t3].[Id2], [t3].[Id3], [t3].[Id4], [t4].[Id], [t4].[Id0]
